title: The full-stack, no-code app builder for everyone
description: Bubble is offering $2,500 in Bubble credits for the first 6 months of being a Bubble user. Bubble is a software development platform that enables anyone to build and launch web applications without writing code.
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: The full-stack, no-code app builder for everyone
